One time, Austin ran the game on a laptop without a dedicated graphics card, and another time I downloaded the itch distribution and was able to run it on a work computer that is very old and has no dedicated graphics card. I don't have the resources to find out more.

specification.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10
  • Processor: AMD Ryzen 5 3600
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: GeForce GTX 1650 4 GB RAM
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 7 GB available space
  • Additional Notes: For now only an partial Xbox Controller and Xbox compatible Controller support is build in. The Menu can't be handled with the controller. If you wish to use the controller, then you need to enable "USE GAMECONTROLLER" in the SETTINGS/CONTROLS Menue. The game runs on Steam deck, but the "P" key need to be mapped to the Steam Deck "view" button. On the Steam Deck the Menu need to be handled with the mouse or the touchpad.

If you wish to use the controller, then you need to enable "USE GAMECONTROLLER" in the SETTINGS/CONTROLS Menue. The game runs on Steam deck, but the "P" key need to be mapped to the Steam Deck "view" button. On the Steam Deck the Menu need to be handled with the mouse or the touchpad.
